repo_name.description: Repo whose workflow built the Artifact with the vuln

git_commit.description: 40 character git commit whose workflow built the Artifact with the vuln

commit_url.description: Full git commit URL built the Artifact with the vuln

artifact_name.description: The name of the Artifact with the vulnerability

snyk_version.description: The version of snyk that found the vulnerability

snyk_severity.description: The severity of the vulnerability, eg high

snyk_url.description: The URL of the snyk vulnerability
